fix reduced-motion bug: scroll-triggered headings/endTags in ScrubVideoSection were permanently stuck at opacity:0 (initial inline style, never set to 1 because useVideoScrub's effect returns early under prefers-reduced-motion, so onProgress never runs) — confirmed via Playwright emulating reduced-motion on live site, text was 100pct invisible on keyboard-transition/geometric sections. Added CSS fallback forcing opacity:1 for textBlock/endTag and hiding hero's monitor-cover vignette under this media query. Verified fix locally
